title.rendered: Lattice Semiconductor and AMI Expand Partnership to Secure Next-gen Server and Datacenter Platforms

content.rendered:
Lattice Semiconductor announced today that it has welcomed AMI into its Lattice Partner Network as the two companies continue their collaborative efforts centered on securing the next generation of server and data center platforms.

“Lattice has long been one of our key partners and we are thrilled to officially join the Lattice Partner Network. This enhanced partnership will further strengthen our ability to develop collaborative solutions with leading FPGA design providers to meet the ever-evolving security needs of our customers,” said Kelly Bryant, AMI Chief Product Officer.

Read the full press release on the Lattice website at https://www.latticesemi.com/about/newsroom/pressreleases/2022/202216-lattice-and-ami-expand-partnership-to-secure-next-gen-server-and-datacenter-platforms

#FIRMlySecure #PlatformFirmwareResilience
